sentences.text: I know, I'm camera off, because many people are here.
I'm like, every day I'm hitting the wall at, like, 1 o'clock, I don't know.
Do you know if you're going to OpTech?
No, yeah, we would come home….
Okay, and then… This thing in Texas, alright, I gotta pick one of them.
I think I'm just gonna pick Optech, and Patrick can go to Willowbridge in Texas.
I can't go to both of them.
it's like their marketing conference that we're sponsoring, and it's October… … what's her name?
Austin, Texas, but, like, I feel like… and Patrick, I told Patrick, I was like, I can't go to both, because I'm going….
Did you have a vacation, too, in there?
Yeah, I'm going to Disney in between the two, literally.
Like, the week I… I'm leaving for Disney the 1st through the 8th, so, like, it would be before and after, and, like, I'm having issues with Braden, like, I cannot… leave him twice like that.
So I said, if I have to go to one, I'll… I'll go to one… like, if I have to go to one of them, but I can't go to both of them, type of thing.
fine with, so I think… but I think it makes more sense.
I mean, the Willbridge is really good, obviously, but, like, I can meet so many more customers at OPTEC, plus be with everybody.
I asked Jennifer to give me an update of what we even need from them, so it may just….
then I could tell her what we are waiting on, and then, like, that's really all this, you know, just sweet.
Yeah, just like an implementation follow-up, basically.
Yeah, I'll let her in, and then we'll go from there.
Oh, we said that at the same time.
Same, same, we're almost there, though, we're almost there.
Is Crystal joining, or is it just us?
Let me send her a message, she may be tied up, but let me message her.

No worries, I know you're the one who's kind of taking the lead on a lot of this implementation stuff, so I just figured we can catch up for just a few minutes on what were, like, outstanding, and then, you know, I don't have too much else, we obviously want to get you guys live as soon as possible, so I just kind of made a list of what we are still looking for, and then just to check in with you guys, and if there was anything you needed, so… Keep it easy for you today.
Crystal was just out of office, wasn't she?
Send her a message, but we can go ahead and get started.
So I know that you're really the one who's doing the majority of the, like, implementation things, so we have most of everything we need, we're just missing the feeds for 12 properties.
Google access for 2, and then most of the social access.
Which I know sounds like a lot, but compared to, like, how much you guys had, like, it's not too, too bad.

So I can't… I mean, I have this here, actually, so… I'll send this in the chat, and I could also email this to you if it would be helpful, or if you want to copy and paste it out of the chat, that's fine too, but we need Google access for these two properties, and then… and you may know this already, and maybe it's something that… You're already working on, but this is what we were missing here.
Can you see that in the chat?
Okay, I can, … I can do that.
And then, the only other thing that we're missing… we have access to, like, a few social properties, … but we do need access to the rest of the social properties.
I know Crystal had given us access initially, because she had her own group of properties, like, that started prior to this larger rollout.
the one who's doing the social, or is Crystal still the one that will do the social?
… We haven't really discussed it, but I can check with Crystal and see.

Okay, I mean, I can send you an email, and I could just put in, hey, like, what I sent in the chat, like, this is what we're missing for Google and feeds, and then we just need Chris, like, hey, Crystal, can you grant access to all the social profiles?
And then other than that, we should have you guys live, like, really quickly.
It's just a matter of getting this last bit of access that we need.
Okay, yeah, I can work on that for you.
We're gonna make it that easy?
Crystal, she has not even seen my message yet, so I'm assuming she's probably super busy today.
I'll shoot her a text message, I'll let her know, no big deal.
I… we'll obviously have ongoing conversations.

I'm gonna add the rest of the team to them moving forward, but I think it makes, obviously, most sense to do that once you're live, so that we can give you, you know, we can get feedback from you and give you updates on things, and, you know, Paige will do reporting and all that kind of check-in stuff, but the biggest focus right now is just obviously getting everything live as soon as possible.
Okay, I will, … I'll start working on that.
Well, we appreciate you, and if you have any questions or anything comes up, just let us know.
